Company Profile: Acme Corp is a well-established consumer goods company with over 50 years in the industry.
Description: Plan and execute marketing campaigns, analyze market trends, and coordinate with sales teams.

Benefits: Health and dental insurance, annual bonus, flexible working hours.

full_text:
✅ Safe & Trusted Job Description (Sample)
🧑‍💻 Job Title: Software Testing Intern
🏢 Company: TechNova Solutions Pvt. Ltd.
📍 Location: Hyderabad, India (Remote/Hybrid)
💼 Job Type: Internship (3–6 months)
📌 About the Company

TechNova Solutions is a registered IT services company specializing in web development, cloud solutions, and AI-based applications. We work with clients across India and globally, ensuring high-quality and secure software delivery.

🎯 Job Description

We are looking for a motivated Software Testing Intern to join our QA team. The candidate will assist in testing web applications, identifying bugs, and ensuring product quality before deployment.

🛠️ Responsibilities
Perform manual testing on web applications
Write and execute test cases
Report bugs using tools like Jira
Collaborate with developers to fix issues
Assist in regression and functional testing
🎓 Requirements
Basic knowledge of Software Testing concepts
Familiarity with SDLC and STLC
Understanding of bug lifecycle
Good communication skills
Pursuing or completed a degree in Computer Science or related field
💰 Stipend

₹8,000 – ₹12,000 per month

🕒 Working Hours

Flexible (5 days a week)
label: Fraudulent
